name: Linda Williams' Many Bean Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the beans and remove any debris. Cover with water and let soak overnight.
2. Drain the soaked beans.
3. Place the beans in a large pot. Add 2 quarts of water and bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat and simmer for 2 to 3 hours, or until tender.
5. Add all remaining ingredients and continue to simmer for another 45 minutes.
6. Optionally, add 1 cup diced potatoes. This is a wonderful soup!
7. Gaye's notes: I used 1/4 lb smoked turkey instead of the hamhock. Also, I used 2 9 oz cans of tomatoes. Next time, I will only use one can.
